name: 政策情境与情景设定
description: 用于写政策信息、政策可及性、情景实验、制度背景和政策干预如何进入研究设计。

clusters.meaning: 政策潜力取决于实际使用而不只是可得性

expressions.note: 比 can help 更谨慎，保留“前景”而非已证实效果。
expressions.example: Flexible work holds promise for advancing gender equality.

expressions.note: 比 depends on 更凝练，强调一个前提条件决定论点是否成立。
expressions.example: This expectation hinges on actual policy use.

expressions.note: 比 hinges on 更正式，适合讨论政策潜力的边界。
expressions.example: The policy effect is contingent upon actual utilization.

expressions.note: 用于区分制度存在和真实使用，避免把 availability 误写成 behavior。
expressions.example: Actual utilization of flexible work remains uneven.

expressions.note: 能精确表达政策或资源“可获得”不等于“被使用”。
expressions.example: We distinguish between FWA availability and use.

expressions.en: Availability does not necessarily translate into use.
expressions.note: 非常适合区分 formal access 与实际行为。
expressions.example: Policy availability does not necessarily translate into use.

clusters.meaning: 政策信息的传播、暴露和传递

expressions.note: 比 policy publicity 更学术，强调政策信息被传递到目标群体。
expressions.example: Policy dissemination can shape family intentions.

expressions.note: 实验语境中比 receive information 更精确，可作为 treatment 描述。
expressions.example: Policy information exposure increased marriage intention.

expressions.note: 用于解释政策存在但未产生效果的信息机制。
expressions.example: Policy benefits may not be accurately transmitted to individuals.

expressions.note: policy implementation 语境中常用，适合定义政策执行。
expressions.example: Stakeholders collaborate to achieve predefined policy goals.

expressions.note: 强调政策来源，区别于企业自发安排。
expressions.example: Government-initiated policies can reshape work norms.

clusters.meaning: 情景实验和政策情景操控

expressions.note: 方法名词组密度高，说明样本、工具和识别方式。
expressions.example: We conduct a population-based vignette survey experiment.

expressions.note: 比 randomly assigning groups 更说明实验操控对象。
expressions.example: The design randomly manipulates three policy scenarios.

expressions.note: 实验设计术语，适合说明被试是否理解情景处理。
expressions.example: We conducted a manipulation check after treatment exposure.

expressions.note: 适合讨论制度从例外福利变为常规安排。
expressions.example: FWAs may become the default option in workplaces.

expressions.en: contrast policy optimism with an evidence gap
expressions.note: 先承认政策讨论热度，再指出系统证据不足，语气稳妥。
expressions.example: Policy optimism remains ahead of systematic evidence.

clusters.meaning: 结构性约束及其政策工具

expressions.note: 比 barrier 更理论化，适合连接制度条件和个体意愿。
expressions.example: Housing prices operate as a structural constraint.

expressions.note: 适合解释政策情景为何能制造强弱不同的制度条件。
expressions.example: The scenarios represent varying degrees of structural constraint.

expressions.note: 常用于说明研究设计把混在一起的机制或效应分开。
expressions.example: The design helps disentangle structural effects.

expressions.note: 政策分类表达，适合写住房、教育、劳动力市场等制度工具。
expressions.example: We compare demand- and supply-side policies.

expressions.note: targeted 比 specific 更政策化，强调瞄准目标群体或机制。
expressions.example: The findings support targeted housing policies.

clusters.meaning: 公共政策制定与配套政策工具

expressions.en: equitable access to and utilization of
expressions.note: 同时覆盖 access 与 use，比 equitable access alone 更完整。
expressions.example: Policies should promote equitable access to and utilization of FWAs.

expressions.en: shape the direction of public policy making
expressions.note: 比 inform policy 更强，适合政策含义较明确时。
expressions.example: The evidence may shape the direction of public policy making.

expressions.note: 适合政策建议中说明信息/规范干预。
expressions.example: Public awareness campaigns could complement housing policies.

expressions.note: complement 表示配套而非替代，适合政策组合。
expressions.example: Educational initiatives can complement housing policies.
